greeting.line: I know you. That's the problem, isn't it? I actually know you.
greeting.line_friendly: I see all of it. I'm still here. Say that's enough.
greeting.line_hostile: Don't ask me to stay if you won't believe me.

lore.line: Here's what you're afraid of: not that I'll leave. That I'll stay, and see all of it, and stay anyway — and you won't believe me. Say it. Say that's not it.
